title: Tianhui Plastics Group participated in the targeted poverty alleviation action of "100 Enterprises Helping 100 Villages" and went through ups and downs, lovingly helping to protect the Hope Home.
contentHtml:
Picture: Tianhui Group assisted Dongtongye Village in Qinglong County in 2019

The integrated and interactive development of villages and enterprises has broadened the path to wealth. Since 2016, Qinhuangdao Tianhui Plastic Co., Ltd. has actively responded to the call of the Party Central Committee and actively participated in the "100 Enterprises Helping 100 Villages" targeted poverty alleviation activities. It is to promote the entrepreneurial spirit and give full play to the social role of entrepreneurs.May 2016Sandao, Qidaohe Township, Qinglong Manchu Autonomous CountyHecunBecoming our company's first target of targeted assistance, when we learned about the actual situation and assistance needs of Sandaohe Village, we adhered to the principle of "doing our best and doing our best" to help, and built a bridge of assistance and love for four consecutive years. Our company and Sandaohe Village established a deep relationship. Now that we see Sandaohe Village developing better and better, our company is even more convinced that"Hundred EnterprisesHelp hundreds of villages”The importance of adhering to this path of love.

picture:Today’s appearance of Sandaohe Village

Since 2016, Qinhuangdao Tianhui Plastic Co., Ltd. has participated inThe targeted poverty alleviation campaign of “100 Enterprises Helping 100 Villages” has so far helped more than ten impoverished villages in Qinglong County, Funing County and other counties. In addition to assistance funds, the company organizes love education and calls on all employees to actively participate in charity donations and donate daily necessities. The company spontaneously organizes and participates in public welfare and charity activities. On the eve of the winter solstice in December 2019, the company spontaneously organized the "Inheritance Charity Action·Tianhui Warms People's Heart" activity to care for Hongyang Nursing Home. On that day, more than 30 volunteers participated spontaneously, specially preparing quick-frozen dumplings, fruits and other daily necessities for the elderly. Organize cultural performances and chat with the elderly. Promoting employee charity and charity education has become one of the important corporate cultures of Tianhui Group.

picture:Tianhui Group spontaneously organizes care for Hongyang Nursing Home

Spring 2020,Qinhuangdao Tianhui Plastic Co., Ltd. fully responded to the call and did its best to protect itself while actively making its own contribution to the fight against the epidemic. On February 7, the company’s chairman Zeng Shengwen took the lead in donating 2,000 yuan to the Red Cross in his own name; on February 8 and 9, he donated 2,000 yuan to the Red Cross.Qinhuangdao Municipal Enterprise Commercial Branch of China Democratic National Construction Association (Special Dues)Donated a total of 60,000 yuan; donated 100,000 yuan to the Qinhuangdao Municipal Health Commission on February 9; actively helped units in need purchase 30,000 masks; starting from February 1, all employees resumed work ahead of schedule, strictly abided by epidemic prevention and control requirements, and worked online from home. Ensure the smooth progress of the company's various businesses. Since the outbreak of the epidemic, the company has sold 4,089 tons of raw material fibers for masks, ensuring the normal supply of raw materials for masks. Every Tianhui person has proven with practical actions that they work together to overcome the difficulties.

As an advanced private enterprise in Qinhuangdao's "100 Enterprises Helping 100 Villages" targeted poverty alleviation campaign, Tianhui Group has identified the actual situation of poor villages in the early stage and formulated precise and practical assistance measures to help poor villages get rid of their backwardness and embark on the road to prosperity. A strong sense of social responsibility empowers Tianhui Group to work together. While developing its own professional plastics trade, it also develops the cutting-edge project Tianhui E-commerce Logistics Industrial Park, an industrial park project that integrates sales, logistics, real-time logistics information, and after-sales.Getting rid of poverty is not the ultimate goal. Making the villagers' lives better is the common aspiration of Tianhui Group.
titleZh: 天晖塑料集团参与“百企帮百村”精准扶贫行动风雨兼程，爱心助守希望家园
contentHtmlZh:
图：2019年天晖集团帮扶青龙县东桐叶村

村企融合互动发展，致富路子越走越宽。自2016年秦皇岛市天晖塑料有限公司积极响应党中央号召，积极参与“百企帮百村”精准扶贫活动。是弘扬企业家精神，发挥企业家社会作用。2016年5月青龙满族自治县七道河乡三道河村成为我公司第一个精准帮扶的对象，当了解到三道河村情实际和帮扶需求有关情况时，本着“量力而行、尽力而为”的帮扶原则，连续4年搭建帮扶爱心桥梁，我公司与三道河村建立了深厚的感情。如今看着三道河村的发展越来越好，我公司更加坚信“百企帮百村”这条爱心道路坚持的重要意义。

图：如今三道河村村容村貌

自2016年秦皇岛市天晖塑料有限公司参与“百企帮百村”精准扶贫活动至今，共帮扶青龙县、抚宁县等贫困村十余个村落。除帮扶款外，公司组织爱心教育号召全体员工积极参与爱心捐助，捐助生活物资。公司自发组织参与公益帮扶献爱心活动，2019年12月冬至前夕，公司自发组织《传承公益行·天晖暖人心》关爱红阳养老院活动。当日自发参加爱心志愿者30余人，特地为老人准备速冻水饺、水果等生活物资。组织文艺汇演，陪老人聊天。提升员工爱心公益教育成为天晖集团重要的企业文化之一。

图：天晖集团自发组织关爱红阳养老院

2020年春，秦皇岛市天晖塑料有限公司全力响应号召，在做好自我防护的同时尽己所能，为抗击疫情积极作出自己的贡献。2月7日，公司董事长曾胜文率先以个人名义向红十字会捐款2000元；2月8日、9日先后向民建秦皇岛市直企业商贸支部（特殊会费）捐款共计6万元；2月9日向秦皇岛市卫生健康委员会捐款10万元；积极帮助有需求的单位采购口罩数量3万支；2月1日起，全员提前复工，严格遵守防控疫情要求，居家线上办公。保证公司各项业务的顺利进行。疫情爆发以来，公司口罩原材料纤维销量4089吨，确保口罩原材料的正常供应。每个天晖人以实际行动证明，勠力同心，共克时艰。

作为秦皇岛“百企帮百村”精准扶贫行动先进民营企业，天晖集团通过前期对接贫困村实际情况，制定精准实际的帮扶措施，帮助贫困村摘掉落后帽子，走上致富路。强大社会责任感赋予天晖集团团结奋斗，在发展自身专业塑料贸易的同时，研发前沿项目天晖电商物流产业园，集销售、物流、物流实时信息、售后等于一体的产业园项目。脱贫摘帽不是最终目标，让村民的日子越过越好，才是天晖集团的共同心愿。
